text.title: blurred-roles-team-evolution Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for blurred-roles-team-evolution as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Blurred roles defined in a Notion page but not reflected in actual work assignment or code ownership.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Blurred roles drift back to silos under deadline pressure. The quarterly audit is the forcing function that prevents reversion.

failure-mode.description: Parallel role-persona agents on the same problem produce contradictions; without a human DRI to converge, the team ships the loudest agent's recommendation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always attach a converge step with a named human DRI.

failure-mode.description: Agents inherit the prompt's role boundary, so a PM-agent given an engineering codebase will silently write code.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Constrain via tool allow-lists per persona, not via prose instructions.

failure-mode.description: Agent-driven skill assessments (e.g., "rate this PM on data fluency from their PRDs") are noisy and biased toward verbose writers.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use as a discussion seed, never as a performance input.

failure-mode.description: The "2 PMs : 1 Engineer" inversion only holds when the engineer is heavily AI-augmented; if you measure on baseline engineering throughput, you'll over-hire PMs and under-build.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: Cross-role knowledge transfer between agents leaks proprietary context (e.g., the data-agent surfaces customer PII in a design-agent prompt).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Run a `password-scrubber-agent` style filter on inter-agent handoffs.
